verdict: Clarisonic Mia Smart uses 300 micro-vibrations per second to remove impurities and dead skin cells from facial pores. While effective for cleansing, it lacks the advanced smart features and broader skin benefits compared to newer competing technologies.

_research.name: Clarisonic Mia Smart Sonic Facial Cleansing Brush
_research.con: Outdated compared to competitor innovations in smart connectivity and multi-function capabilities.
